text: hazaqen el-hagevira habechira veel-baneyha asher ani ohev otam beemet velo-ani levadi ki im-gam kal-yode'ey haemet
lema'an haemet ha'omedet beqirebenu vegam-tiheye 'imanu le'olam
yehi 'imanu chesed verachamim veshalom meet haelohim avinu umeet adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha ben-haav beemet uveahava
samacheti meod ki-matsati mibanayikh mitehalekhim baemet kamitseva asher qibalenu meet haav
ve'ata mevaqesh ani mimekh hagevira velo kekhotev elayikh mitseva chadasha ki im-et asher hayetah-lanu merosh leahava ish et-re'ehu
vezot hi haahava asher nitehalekh bemitseotayv zot hi hamitseva asher shema'etem merosh lehitehalekh bah
ki mate'im rabim bau la'olam asher eynam modim beyeshu'a hamashicha haba vabasar ze hu hamate'e vesoten hamashicha
hizaharu pen-tovad mimenu pe'ulatenu ki im-niqach masekuretenu shelema
kal-ha'over 'al-torat hamashicha veeynenu 'omed bah eyn lo elohim veha'omed betorat hamashicha yesh-lo gam-haav gam-haben
kal-haba aleykhem velo yavi et-hatora hazot lo-taasefu oto habayeta velo tishealu-lo leshalom
ki hashoel bishelomo chaver hu lema'asayv hara'im
harebe yesh-li likhetov aleykhem velo chafatseti bineyar uvideyo ki im-aqave lavo aleykhem uledaber pe el-pe lema'an tiheye simechatenu shelema
beney achotekh habechira shoalim lishelomekh amen ﻿
